understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) and subsequent levels by navigating the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spikes ('u'/'v') which immediately end the run on contact.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK/UNDO. After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (e.g., o/m/w), hit a hazard (spike) and die, or reach the goal '+'. CLICK removes a breakable 'x' block at a specified [x,y] to open/alter fall paths and does not consume platform-timer moves when present; UNDO reverts the previous action. The structured state previews where left/right moves will ultimately land after gravity, and corridor_scan indicates reachable columns and passage drops, which should be prioritized for progress. There are 2 attempts per level with a 50-turn budget per attempt.
